# DH Forge

DH Forge provides free static browser tools at https://dhforge.github.io/.

Main sections:
- Free Toolbox: text, date, unit, color, ratio, timer, QR, random picker, and image tools.
- Printable Paper Lab: graph paper, dot grid paper, lined paper, Cornell notes, handwriting paper, music staff paper, weekly planner, habit tracker, checklist, and isometric paper generators.
- Kids Practice Lab: printable worksheets for number tracing, letters, Hangul, arithmetic, clocks, mazes, line tracing, and coloring.
- Study Card & Planner Lab: installable flash cards, review planner, focus timer, mistake notes, D-day checklist, and JSON backup.

Language versions:
- Korean Free Toolbox: https://dhforge.github.io/
- English Free Toolbox: https://dhforge.github.io/en/
- English Printable Paper Lab: https://dhforge.github.io/paper/
- Korean Printable Paper Lab: https://dhforge.github.io/paper/ko/
- Korean Kids Practice Lab: https://dhforge.github.io/kids/
- English Kids Practice Lab: https://dhforge.github.io/kids/en/
- Study Card & Planner Lab: https://dhforge.github.io/study/

Machine-readable files:
- Sitemap index: https://dhforge.github.io/sitemap-index.xml
- Main sitemap: https://dhforge.github.io/sitemap.xml
- Paper sitemap: https://dhforge.github.io/paper/sitemap.xml
- Kids sitemap: https://dhforge.github.io/kids/sitemap.xml
- Study sitemap: https://dhforge.github.io/study/sitemap.xml
- Web app manifest: https://dhforge.github.io/site.webmanifest
